steps.title: Translate total flowers constraint
steps.content: The problem states 'no more than 188 total flowers planted.' Since l represents lilies and d represents daisies, this translates to the inequality $$l + d \leq 188$$.

steps.title: Translate lilies-to-daisies ratio constraint
steps.content: The condition 'lilies will be at most four times daisies' means $$l \leq 4d$$. This establishes the second inequality in the system.

steps.title: Identify system in answer choices
steps.content: The system with $$l + d \leq 188$$ and $$l \leq 4d$$ matches D. This system correctly models both constraints from the problem.
